interventions.name: R2 Intervention 1
interventions.summary: sorting-rule prompts that require naming the classification basis before organizing data

interventions.name: R2 Intervention 2
interventions.summary: data-to-chart matching tasks that link representations back to recorded entries

interventions.name: R2 Intervention 3
interventions.summary: same-data-different-display comparisons across tables and simple charts

interventions.name: R2 Intervention 4
interventions.summary: category-check routines that test whether each data item still fits the chosen rule
